summary: Cross-referenced 5 high-priority GENESIS class headers against raw decompiled .c files to improve type accuracy.

changes.evidence: Constructor 0x805a3c94: sth (store halfword) at 0x2C, not stw (store word). Confirms u16 not void*.
Gap between u16 at 0x2C and void* at 0x30. 2 bytes padding needed.

changes.new_comment: effect slot count (set from race state; 6 for online, 3 for someFlag)
changes.evidence: Constructor sets 0x1C to 6 when someFlag==1, or to value from race state otherwise.
Constructor: r3 = global+0xb74; r0 = r3-6; r0 = clz(r0); r0 >>= 5; store to 0x25.

changes.new_comment: vehicle body flag (set to 1 when global+0x26 == 3)
changes.evidence: Constructor: r0 = lbz 0x26(r4); cmp r0, 3; if equal: store 1 to 0x26(r31).

changes.new_comment: 320 bytes. Zeros two Vec4f blocks at 0xF0-0xFF and 0x100-0x10F. NOTE: may conflict with s16 charge fields.
changes.evidence: clearBoost at 0x805857cc writes f32 at 0xF0,0xF4,0xF8,0xFC and 0x100,0x104,0x108,0x10C via stfs instructions.

changes.old_comment: Returns hop stick X adjusted for driving direction
changes.new_comment: Reads accessor via vtable, checks bit 14/27/17-18 of flags. Negates when backwards. mulli confirms 0x248 array stride.
changes.evidence: 0x805814e0: mulli r0, r0, 0x248; lwz r3, 0x14(r3); rlwinm checks bits 14, 27, 17-18.
Inferred from accessor chain and community header.

changes.new_comment: super mini-turbo charge. CAUTION: clearBoost writes f32 here — may be wrong offset.
changes.evidence: clearBoost at 0x805857cc: stfs f0, 0x100(r31). This contradicts s16 type.

changes.new_comment: Verified against decompiled Physics/ files. They access via virtual interface, not direct field access. Layout confirmed by community.
changes.evidence: All Physics/ decomp files use vtable calls (vtable[4], vtable[0xC], etc.) and BSP array indices, never direct KartDynamics field offsets.

changes.new_comment: 0xC bytes (may contain quaternion part or alignment)
changes.evidence: No direct access found in decomp. Kept as unknown gap.

changes.new_comment: Individual byte-addressed bools, not bitfields. Verified by lbz+clrlwi patterns in calc().
changes.evidence: Community header analysis; decomp shows individual byte loads for these flags.

changes.new_comment: possibly previous-frame/target up vector for stabilization interpolation
changes.evidence: Positioned between upInterpolated (0x180) and angVel0YFactor (0x1A4). Stabilization-related.
0x1A8 + sizeof(EGG::Vector3f) = 0x1A8 + 0xC = 0x1B4
Init sets to 0.8f. Name '_1c' was misleading (suggested offset 0x1C but was at 0x18).
Zeroed in init. Used as collision normal accumulator in checkNeighborhood. Name '_20' misleading.
Zeroed in init. Name '_50' suggested offset 0x50 but was at 0x4C. Likely OOB distance.
Zeroed in init. Updated in checkNeighborhood when colPerp > max. Name '_68' suggested offset 0x68 but was at 0x64.
Zeroed in init. Fixed name to match actual offset 0x6C.

changes.new_comment: Confirmed 0xF0 bytes via mulli+addi loop in createInstance
changes.evidence: 0x80532340: mulli r3, r3, 0xf0; addi r5, r5, 0xf0; addi r6, r6, 0xf0; cmplw r5, r7.
Name '_d4' suggested offset 0xD4 but field is at 0xBC. Renamed to match.
Name '_dc' suggested offset 0xDC but field is at 0xC4. Renamed to match.
Name '_e0' suggested offset 0xE0 but field is at 0xC8. Renamed to match.
createInstance decomp shows u32 at 0xD0, u32 at 0xD4, u16 pairs at 0xD8-0xDE, u8 triplets at 0xE0-0xE2, u16 at 0xE8, u8 at 0xEC. These 29 bytes fill the gap between Rating (ends 0xCF) and _ec (0xEC).

changes.new_comment: Scenario at this+0x20. Ghost files at this+0xC10. Each Scenario ~0xBF0 bytes.
changes.evidence: Constructor 0x80532644: addi r3, r31, 0x20 (scenario); addi r3, r31, 0xc10 (ghosts).
